title: Atomic Kernel Inference (AKI) — AgDR Enforcement Layer
i_definition: the exact atomic capture point at model inference instant

mission.statement: To deliver an evidentiary standard for autonomous agents that is mathematically and legally above reproach by making every decision verifiable at the exact inference point.
mission.ppp_note: The precise meaning of each P is of the beholder. AgDR captures atomic PPP Provenance for every inference.
mission.enforcement: The PPP triplet SHALL be captured verbatim and atomically with every inference, reasoning trace, and human delta chain

data_capture_mode.reasoning_capture: full trace captured atomically at the 'i' point

human_delta_policy.escalation: unlimited layers terminating in Fiduciary Office Intervener (FOI)

policy_triplet.guarantee: captured at inference instant — no post-facto editing or reconstruction possible

universal_inference_wrapper.wrapper_signature: agdr_capture(ctx, prompt, model_id, reasoning_trace, output, ppp_triplet, human_delta_chain)
universal_inference_wrapper.compatibility: any current or future inference model

core_guarantee.formal_definition: AtomicInferenceCapture(...) ≡ { sign(BLAKE3(ctx ‖ reasoning_trace ‖ ppp_triplet ‖ human_delta_chain)), persist(Merkle-append), return committed }
invariants: Evidentiary standard remains mathematically indivisible and legally above reproach
Full record directly enforceable under existing fiduciary and corporate governance rules

architecture.entry_point: universal wrapper triggers AKI at inference instant

agdr_integration.one_line_addition: Capture SHALL include the Policy = PPP triplet (meaning of the beholder) with atomic PPP Provenance, binary Human Delta Policy, and FOI terminal role.

ppp_triplet_schema.description: JSON schema for the PPP triplet captured at every inference instant. Meaning of each field is of the beholder — these are the structural requirements only.

schema.title: PPP Triplet
schema.description: The three-field policy triplet captured atomically at every AgDR inference instant

provenance.description: Where we are today. Who is acting, on whose behalf, from what verified state. Meaning of the beholder.

place.description: Where we are going. The intended destination, target state, and regulatory boundary. Meaning of the beholder.

purpose.description: Why we are going. The explicit intent, desired behaviour, and ethical anchor. Closed by Beauty, Truth & Wisdom. Meaning of the beholder.

schema.note: additionalProperties: true — organizations may extend the triplet with domain-specific fields. The three core fields are mandatory.

human_delta_chain_schema.description: JSON schema for the human delta chain appended to every AgDR record.

agdr_record_schema.description: Top-level schema for a complete AgDR record — the unit of evidentiary capture.

merkle_position.description: Position in the forward-secret Merkle chain

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the BLAKE3 hash

committed.description: Always true — partial records never exist

why_this_is_final: Reduced to clean acronym PPP. Meaning of the beholder. Provenance front-and-center. This is now the definitive, timeless, above-reproach Canadian standard.
